FADE IN:

INT. COFFEE SHOP - DAY

Rain taps against the front window.
MIA sits alone, staring at a notebook.

MIA
(quietly)
I should have called him back.

JONAH
Then call him now.

Mia looks up. Jonah stands by the counter with two coffees.

EXT. CITY STREET - NIGHT

Cars hiss through the wet road.
Jonah steps into the neon glow and checks his phone.

JONAH (V.O.)
Some nights never really end.

CUT TO:
